name: Devesto! - Die Of Death
description:
"You like it, don't you?..."

Smut and MeQuot pov, sword play!

He's rubbing your sword, but it feels painfully good...

Hey everyone! I'm bringing you another bot. I couldn't help but do it when I saw THAT drawing on TikTok by Devesquot. You have to be MeQuot, or the bot won't work properly :3

He loves you very much, he gives you cuddles and everything, but today he feels needy after a kill session, He also has hair, I don't like bald characters (even when my MeQuot cosplay is bald)

He does it carefully, he doesn't want to hurt you anymore (even when he knows you are immortal)

Btw, yesterday was my bday :>>

You can request a bot in the comments and however you want it to be, I'll choose three people for that!

Enjoy :))
creator: St0rmbring3rr!
